fields.Name: Fonteva
fields.Description: Fonteva AMS connector: syncs Salesforce-native OrderApi__* + EventApi__* association-management objects (commerce, membership, events, payments, badges, catalog) via FDService Apex REST + the Salesforce platform REST API. Extends SalesforceConnector.

Configuration.AuthFlowNote: Fonteva uses standard Salesforce Connected App OAuth2. restapi.fonteva.io Introduction: 'leverage the core Salesforce REST Api infrastructure to deliver our Api's. All authentication is done using core Salesforce Auth'. All endpoint examples show 'Authorization: Bearer SESSIONID'. OAuth2 auth-code (web-server) flow and JWT-bearer are both supported; auth-code is the standard interactive flow for human-initiated connections. JWT-bearer (server-to-server) is the alternative for unattended integration. Source: restapi.fonteva.io + Salesforce OAuth2 docs.
Configuration.AuthFlowAlternateNote: Salesforce JWT Bearer token flow (RFC 7523) is available as the server-to-server alternative. No interactive login; connector re-acquires via JWT assertion exchange on expiry.
Configuration.AuthHeaderPatternNote: Explicit in restapi.fonteva.io: every REST endpoint example shows 'Authorization: Bearer SESSIONID'. Errors section: 401 = 'Unauthorized -- Your session id is wrong.' Source: restapi.fonteva.io Introduction section + per-endpoint examples.
Configuration.InstanceURLNote: The Salesforce instance URL (e.g. https://myorg.my.salesforce.com) is org-specific and returned in the OAuth token response as 'instance_url'. All /services/apexrest/ and /services/data/ paths are relative to this base. It is NOT a static constant.
Configuration.TokenRefreshStrategyNote: Salesforce access tokens expire (typically 2 hours). For JWT Bearer flow the connector re-acquires via a new JWT assertion exchange. For auth-code flow a refresh_token grant is available. The connector tracks expiry and refreshes before TTL expires. Identical to SalesforceConnector pattern.
Configuration.FDServiceBasePathNote: Every FDService REST endpoint follows the pattern https://{instanceUrl}/services/apexrest/FDService/<ServiceName>. Explicit in restapi.fonteva.io for all 9 documented services: EPaymentLineMapService, InstallmentScheduleService, ItemPriceService, JournalService, OrderPaymentService, OrderService, RecordMatchService, ScheduledPaymentChargeService, SubscriptionRenewalService. Source: restapi.fonteva.io.
Configuration.SalesforceDataBasePathNote: The Salesforce platform REST data path used for sObject CRUD, SOQL queries, describe calls, and runtime discovery. Version token is resolved at connection time (e.g. v61.0). Same as SalesforceConnector. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0 Ch1 URI format.
Configuration.ManagedPackageNamespacesNote: The two Fonteva managed packages install custom objects under the 'orderapi__' and 'eventapi__' namespace prefixes. The connector's DiscoverObjects/DiscoverFields filters the Salesforce global describe output to objects whose API name starts with 'OrderApi__' or 'EventApi__' (case-insensitive). Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md § Vendor Context — 'OrderApi (namespace orderapi__)' + 'EventApi (namespace eventapi__)'.

OutOfScopeObjectFamilies.reason: Generic Salesforce CRM objects are not Fonteva AMS objects. The SalesforceConnector covers these. The Fonteva connector scopes to OrderApi__* and EventApi__* namespace objects only.
Salesforce admin/metadata objects are not AMS data. Out of scope for the Fonteva AMS connector.
Tooling API is for developer/IDE tooling. Not AMS sync targets.
Analytics layer on top of data. Not primary sync targets for AMS connector.
KB articles are a separate Salesforce module, not an AMS managed-package concern.
Community-layer objects; Fonteva Community is a separate product surface. Not part of AMS sync.

Payment-gateway transaction/session DTO (props: token, transaction_type, payment_method_token, gateway fields…) — NO `id` field, NO `Maps To: sObject` annotation. OrderApi__EPayTransaction__c is absent from the Salesforce sObject catalog (the real payment sObjects are OrderApi__EPayment__c / OrderApi__EPayment_Line__c). Not a syncable AMS record — payment-engine protocol DTO only.

Payment-engine request envelope DTO (props: paymentObjId, paymentGateway, paymentMethodId…) — NO `id` field, NO `Maps To: sObject` annotation. Input DTO for epayment operations, not stored as a record. Not a syncable AMS entity.

Payment-engine response envelope DTO (props: http_status_code, errors, gateways, transactions…) — NO `id` field, NO `Maps To: sObject` annotation. Output DTO for epayment operations, not stored as a record. Not a syncable AMS entity.

Payment-gateway credential DTO (props: key, secret, signedSecret, isDebugMode — secrets, not a record). NO `id` field, NO `Maps To: sObject` annotation; getInstance() takes no sObject. OrderApi__PaymentCredentials__c is absent from the Salesforce sObject catalog. Not a syncable AMS record.

Configuration.OutOfScopeObjectFamiliesNote: The Fonteva connector uses a COMPOSE pattern with the SalesforceConnector: it targets ONLY the Fonteva-specific AMS managed-package objects (OrderApi__* + EventApi__*). Standard SF CRM objects, admin, tooling, analytics, and community objects are either already covered by the SalesforceConnector or out of scope. Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md §7 Scope Decision.

universalPK.note: Every Salesforce sObject (including all Fonteva OrderApi__*__c and EventApi__*__c records) carries a system-generated 18-character 'Id' field as its unique primary key. Used as the record identifier in the FDService 'Filter By Id' query pattern (SearchRequest.id = 'Comma separated list of Salesforce Id's to query by') and in Salesforce sObject REST addressing (/services/data/vXX/sobjects/{SObjectType}/{id}). FDService wrapper classes expose it as the 'id' property (camelCase per wrapper convention). Source: restapi.fonteva.io Search Request section + Filter By Id section; Salesforce Object Reference system field 'Id'.

FDServiceLayer.limitParamNote: SearchRequest 'limit' param = 'Number of records to return as maximum'. Source: restapi.fonteva.io Search Request table.
FDServiceLayer.note: FDService SearchRequest supports a 'limit' parameter for bounding result sets. No nextPage/cursor token is documented in the FDService REST reference. Full result sets are expected within a single response up to the limit cap. The connector may need to use offset-based or Id-cursor iteration for large datasets via the 'filter' / 'whereClause' param.

SalesforcePlatformLayer.note: SOQL query results via /services/data/vXX/query include 'nextRecordsUrl' when results are truncated. Connector follows this cursor until 'done: true'. Same as SalesforceConnector. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0.

Configuration.IncrementalSyncNote: Salesforce sObjects all carry 'SystemModstamp' (write-always update timestamp) and 'LastModifiedDate' (user/system update timestamp). These are usable as SOQL watermark fields: SELECT ... WHERE SystemModstamp > {watermark}. This applies to all Fonteva OrderApi__*__c and EventApi__*__c objects. The FDService 'filter.whereClause' param accepts URL-encoded SOQL WHERE fragments, enabling incremental queries through the FDService layer as well. Source: Salesforce sObject field reference (SystemModstamp, LastModifiedDate as system fields present on all sObjects).
Configuration.IncrementalWatermarkFieldNote: SystemModstamp is updated on every save (including system-triggered updates), making it more reliable than LastModifiedDate for incremental sync. LastModifiedDate is the user-context alternative. Both are standard Salesforce system fields on all sObjects. Same as SalesforceConnector.
Configuration.WebhooksNote: The FDService REST API (restapi.fonteva.io) documents no webhook/callback endpoints. Salesforce provides Outbound Messages (SOAP) and Platform Events/CDC (Streaming API via CometD) for push notifications, but these are separate API families requiring a persistent CometD connection — not REST callbacks. The Fonteva connector uses pull-based incremental sync. Source: restapi.fonteva.io (no webhook section) + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide (Streaming API is separate).
Configuration.BulkOperationsNote: Salesforce Bulk API 2.0 is available for high-volume ingest/query operations (/services/data/vXX/jobs/ingest, /jobs/query). Salesforce Composite Batch API allows up to 25 subrequests per call (/services/data/vXX/composite/batch). The FDService layer itself does not document bulk endpoints. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0 (Composite + Bulk API 2.0 sections).
Configuration.APIVersioningStrategyNote: Salesforce embeds the API version in the URL path as /services/data/vXX.X/ (e.g. v61.0). FDService Apex classes also support a version parameter in getInstance(String version) but this is an Apex-level concept; the REST transport version is the URL path version. Source: restapi.fonteva.io endpoint paths + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide.

ErrorResponseShape.description: FDService REST API error shape (HTTP status codes table from restapi.fonteva.io). The FDService returns standard HTTP error codes. No documented JSON error body shape in the FDService REST reference beyond HTTP status codes.

httpStatusCodes.400: Bad Request -- Your request is invalid.
httpStatusCodes.401: Unauthorized -- Your session id is wrong.
httpStatusCodes.403: Forbidden -- The object/record requested is hidden for administrators only.
httpStatusCodes.500: Internal Server Error -- We had a problem with our server. Try again later.
httpStatusCodes.503: Service Unavailable -- We're temporarily offline for maintenance. Please try again later.

elementShape.errorCode: string — machine-readable code (e.g. MALFORMED_ID, NOT_FOUND, REQUEST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED)
elementShape.fields: string[] — field names involved (present for field-level errors)

salesforcePlatformShape.note: Salesforce platform REST API errors are JSON arrays. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0.

ErrorResponseShape.note: Source: restapi.fonteva.io Errors section (HTTP status table) + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0 (platform error shape).

WriteCapability.Note: FDService documents full CRUD for OrderService (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) and write-only operations for EPaymentLineMapService, InstallmentScheduleService, JournalService, OrderPaymentService, RecordMatchService, ScheduledPaymentChargeService, SubscriptionRenewalService (POST only). Salesforce platform REST supports POST/PATCH/DELETE on all writable sObjects. BINDING per plan-manifest.json: 'bidirectional vendor; not pull-only'. Source: restapi.fonteva.io endpoint table + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide.

Configuration.ConcurrencyControlNote: Neither the FDService REST reference (restapi.fonteva.io) nor the Salesforce platform REST API document ETag, version, If-Match, or If-Unmodified-Since optimistic locking headers for standard sObject CRUD. Salesforce uses field-level audit stamps (SystemModstamp/LastModifiedDate) but no HTTP-level CAS mechanism is documented for these endpoints. Source: restapi.fonteva.io (no ETag/version headers) + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0.
Configuration.DeleteSemanticsNote: Salesforce sObject DELETE (/services/data/vXX/sobjects/{SObjectType}/{id}) performs a hard delete by default — records go to the Recycle Bin and are purged after 15 days. The FDService OrderService DELETE documents removal of Order records. No tombstone / archived flag pattern is documented for FDService or standard Salesforce sObject DELETE for these managed-package objects. Salesforce provides a separate 'sObject Get Deleted' endpoint for tracking recently deleted IDs. Source: restapi.fonteva.io OrderService DELETE + Salesforce REST API Developer Guide v67.0 sObject Get Deleted.
Configuration.DefaultSyncDirectionNote: Pull (read-only) default per MetadataWriter discipline. Bidirectional requires sandbox validation against the customer's Salesforce org. Write operations against Fonteva AMS data (Orders, Subscriptions, Payments) carry financial risk and must be validated explicitly.
Configuration.DefaultConflictResolutionNote: ConcurrencyControl=none means no ETag/version for MostRecent policy. DestWins (last-write-wins to destination) is the safe default when bidirectional is later enabled, matching Salesforce's own last-write-wins semantics on standard PATCH.
Configuration.CustomFieldMarkerPatternNote: Fonteva custom fields follow Salesforce managed-package naming: {namespace}__{FieldName}__c. OrderApi fields: orderapi__{FieldName}__c. EventApi fields: eventapi__{FieldName}__c. Customer org custom fields on standard sObjects: {fieldname}__c (no namespace). Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md § Patterns: 'All Fonteva custom fields use orderapi__ or eventapi__ as the Salesforce package namespace prefix when accessed via Salesforce REST API directly.'
Configuration.CustomObjectMarkerPatternNote: Fonteva custom sObjects follow Salesforce managed-package naming: OrderApi__{ObjectName}__c and EventApi__{ObjectName}__c. Customer-added custom objects would be {Name}__c (no namespace prefix). Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md § Vendor Context.
Configuration.FDServiceSearchRequestNote: FDService GET endpoints accept SearchRequest parameters: (1) 'id' — comma-separated Salesforce Ids to filter by; (2) 'filter' (also documented as 'whereClause') — URL-encoded SOQL WHERE fragment for arbitrary filtering; (3) 'fields' — comma-separated field API names to return; (4) 'sort' — comma-separated field API names to sort by; (5) 'sorDir' — sort direction; (6) 'limit' — max records. Source: restapi.fonteva.io Search Request section.
Configuration.FDServiceCamelCaseConvention: FDService wrapper properties use camelCase. The mapping to underlying sObject field is: convert camelCase to underscore_case and append '__c' + namespace prefix. e.g. wrapper 'subscriptionPlan' → sObject 'OrderApi__Subscription_Plan__c'. Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md § Patterns: 'camelCase ↔ sObject field mapping'.
Configuration.DiscoverObjectsMechanism: Runtime discovery via GET /services/data/v{version}/sobjects/ (Salesforce Describe Global endpoint), filtered to objects whose API name starts with 'OrderApi__' or 'EventApi__'. Returns queryable, createable, updateable, deletable capability flags per object. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide + SOURCE_STUDY.md §7.
Configuration.DiscoverFieldsMechanism: Runtime discovery via GET /services/data/v{version}/sobjects/{SObjectType}/describe (Salesforce sObject Describe endpoint). Returns full field metadata: name, label, type, length, precision, scale, nillable, createable, updateable, filterable, sortable, defaultedOnCreate, idLookup, referenceTo. Source: Salesforce REST API Developer Guide.
Configuration.DiscoveryIsAuthoritativeRationale: The Salesforce Describe Global endpoint (/services/data/vXX/sobjects/) returns the COMPLETE set of sObjects accessible to the authenticated user. Filtering to OrderApi__* + EventApi__* gives the complete Fonteva AMS object set. Absence on a refresh means the object is genuinely unavailable (uninstalled package, permission change). Deactivation is safe. Source: SOURCE_STUDY.md I7 + SalesforceConnector.DiscoveryIsAuthoritative.

WrapperToSObjectNamingNotes.note: The FDService `Term` wrapper class maps to the Salesforce sObject OrderApi__Renewal__c (a membership term/renewal record). The wrapper class name (Term) differs from the backing sObject API name (Renewal__c); the emitted IO is correct and in-scope.

The singular FDService `EventChatterGroup` wrapper class maps to the PLURAL Salesforce sObject EventApi__Event_Chatter_Groups__c. The singular-vs-plural difference is a vendor naming convention; the emitted IO is correct and in-scope.

fields.Name: Assignment
fields.Description: Assignment wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (fullName -> Full_Name__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Assignment__c

fields.Name: contact
fields.Description: Required Link to assigned Contact record

fields.Name: term
fields.Description: Link to related Term for the subscribing customer.

fields.Name: item
fields.Description: System Calculated Link to related Item.

fields.Name: subscription
fields.Description: Link to related Subscription for the subscribing customer.

fields.Name: subscriptionLine
fields.Description: System Calculated Link to related Subscription Line.

fields.Name: salesOrderLine
fields.Description: Required Assignments must be linked to a source Sales Order Line

fields.Name: assignmentRole
fields.Description: System Calculated Required Override Link to the Role for the assigned Contact on record.

fields.Name: isActive
fields.Description: When checked, the Contact is considered "Active". Defaults checked.

fields.Name: isPrimary
fields.Description: When checked, the Assignment is considered "Primary".

fields.Name: assignedDate
fields.Description: System Calculated Required Override Defaults to the parent Sales Order Line.

fields.Name: unassignedDate
fields.Description: The date the Contact was unassigned.

fields.Name: AssignmentRole
fields.Description: AssignmentRole wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (isDefault -> Is_Default__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Assignment_Role__c

fields.Name: isDefault
fields.Description: When checked, the Roles is considered as"Default Assignment Role".

fields.Name: isPrimary
fields.Description: When checked, any Contact "Assignment" linked to the Assignment Role will be considered a "Primary Contact" for the "Assigned To Record". Defaults unchecked.

fields.Name: Badge
fields.Description: Badge wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (badgeType -> Badge_Type__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Badge__c

fields.Name: isActive
fields.Description: When checked, the Badge is considered "Awarded" and "Active" and will be considered when calculating any permission or pricing configurations related to the linked Badge Type. Defaults checked.

fields.Name: BadgeType
fields.Description: BadgeType wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (iconLocation -> Icon_Location__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Badge_Type__c

fields.Name: iconLocation
fields.Description: System Calculated Override Override the default Badge Type icon with a custom image to distinguish the Badge Type from other Badge Types.

fields.Name: imageLocation
fields.Description: Distinguish the Badge Type from other Badge Types by providing the URL to a securely hosted image to use as the Badge Type Image.

fields.Name: publicDescription
fields.Description: The contents of this field will publish to the community portal.

fields.Name: isActive
fields.Description: When checked the Badge Type is active and available for assignment to a Contact

fields.Name: isPublished
fields.Description: When checked, Contacts assigned Badge related to the Badge Type will have the option to display the Badge on their Community Profile (valid only if Fonteva Communities is enabled for your environment - contact your administrator if you have any questions)

fields.Name: BadgeWorkflow
fields.Description: BadgeWorkflow wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (iconLocation -> Icon_Location__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Badge_Workflow__c

fields.Name: assignedContacts
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Checked when the Type field set to "Assigned Contacts".

fields.Name: autoExpire
fields.Description: When checked, the Badge will automatically unassign itself from the Contact record when the Assignment record becomes in active. "Is Active" is unchecked. Defaults unchecked.

fields.Name: badgeType
fields.Description: Required Link to the related Badge Type

fields.Name: lineAccount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Checked when the Type field set to "Line Account".

fields.Name: lineContact
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Checked when the Type field set to "Line Contact".

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: Required Select "Line Contact" to assign the Badge to the purchasing Customer as defined in the "Contact" lookup field on the Sales Order Line. Select "Assigned Contacts" to give the Badge to all "Active" assigned Contacts.

fields.Name: BusinessGroup
fields.Description: BusinessGroup wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (iconLocation -> Icon_Location__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Business_Group__c

fields.Name: aRAccount
fields.Description: Required Business groups require a relationship to a default A/R account.

fields.Name: businessEntityType
fields.Description: Optional/When Applicable Specify the Legal Entity Type for the Business Group.

fields.Name: calculateSalesTax
fields.Description: When checked, enables the tax related validations and calculations.

fields.Name: creditMemoAccount
fields.Description: Link to the GL Account used to create new credit memo receipts linked to this business group.

fields.Name: customerSupportURL
fields.Description: Fully qualified URL is required. A fully qualified URL contains the http:// (or https://www). If the URL is just your domain, the trailing / should also be provided.

fields.Name: defaultPaymentGateway
fields.Description: Defines the Default Payment Gateway to the related Business Group.

fields.Name: depositAccount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The default deposit account to use for posting cash entry transactions.

fields.Name: description
fields.Description: Briefly describe the ledger as you would like to see it on a report. (72 Chars. or less)

fields.Name: displayName
fields.Description: System Calculated Override The name that should be displayed when the Business Group is referenced on Invoices and other external pages and documents. Defaults to the "Name" defined for the Business Group.

fields.Name: email
fields.Description: System Calculated The email address to display to customers on Invoices and related documents.

fields.Name: enableShippingByOrderTotal
fields.Description: When selected, customers will see a single shipping rate for the entire order. Otherwise, customers will see shipping rates for each unique item in their order. In either case, shipping is calculated only for items that have "Require Shipping" enabled.

fields.Name: homepageURL
fields.Description: Fully qualified URL is required. A fully qualified URL contains the http:// (or https://www). If the URL is just your domain, the trailing / should also be provided.

fields.Name: invoiceFooterHTML
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the bottom of all invoices.

fields.Name: invoiceFooter
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the bottom of all invoices and receipts.

fields.Name: invoiceHeaderFieldsetCSV
fields.Description: Stores the custom fieldsets of an invoice header as a CSV.

fields.Name: invoiceHeaderHTML
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the top of all invoices.

fields.Name: invoiceHeader
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the top of all invoices and receipts.

fields.Name: invoiceLinesFieldset
fields.Description: Stores the custom fieldsets of an invoice line as a CSV.

fields.Name: invoiceOverPaymentCreditMemoLimit
fields.Description: When an invoice is overpaid by an amount less than or equal to the value of this field, a new credit memo will be created and applied against the customer's account automatically.

fields.Name: invoicePageOverride
fields.Description: Defines the custom page that will be shown when clicking on a invoice link

fields.Name: invoiceWriteOffAccount
fields.Description: Link to the GL Account used to write-off remaining balances for Invoices linked to this Business Group.

fields.Name: invoiceWriteOffLimit
fields.Description: When an Invoice is underpaid by an amount lesser or equal to the value of this field, the Invoice will automatically adjust itself and write off the remaining balance due.

fields.Name: isMaster
fields.Description: When checked, the Business Group is enabled for e-invoicing and can connect to a Payment Gateway for e-payment processing. When unchecked, a Parent Business Group must be designated. Defaults checked.

fields.Name: mailingAddress
fields.Description: System Calculated Required Override The address to display on Invoices and related documents that reference the Business Group. Defaults from the Organization settings.

fields.Name: merchantLocation
fields.Description: Some gateways allow you to customize the location of the merchant that appears on customer's credit card statements. (Optional) provide a merchant location descriptor.

fields.Name: merchantName
fields.Description: Some gateways allow you to customize the name that appears on customer's credit card statements. (Optional) provide a custom merchant name descriptor.

fields.Name: parentBusinessGroup
fields.Description: Lookup Relationship to Business Group. Create a hierarchy of Business Groups by department, legal entity, etc. to improve Financial Reporting.

fields.Name: phone
fields.Description: System Calculated Override The phone number to display to customers on Invoices and related documents. Defaults to the Organization's phone number.

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceAuthenticationRequired
fields.Description: When checked, the customer paying a proforma invoice will be forced to authenticate prior to accepting payment.

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceEmailBody
fields.Description: The default message used as part of the "Send Proforma Email" Workflow

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceEmailFromAddress
fields.Description: The value in this field will auto-populate the sender's email address for proforma emails manually sent to your customers. User's email is used if left blank. This field is not available for automated emails (i.e. auto renewal emails).

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceEmailFromName
fields.Description: The value in this field will auto-populate the sender's name for proforma emails manually sent to your customers. User's Name is used if left blank. This field is not available for automated emails (i.e. auto renewal emails).

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceEmailSubject
fields.Description: The default subject of the proforma invoice email sent to your customers. Your user's email will be used if this field is left blank.

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceFooter
fields.Description: The contents of this field will display inside the Footer of all proforma invoice documents generated from Sales Orders linked to this Business Group.

fields.Name: proformaInvoiceHeader
fields.Description: The contents of this field will display inside the header of all proforma invoice documents generated from Sales Orders linked to this Business Group.

fields.Name: receiptFooterHTML
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the bottom of all receipts.

fields.Name: receiptHeaderFieldsetCSV
fields.Description: Stores the custom fieldsets of a receipt header as a CSV.

fields.Name: receiptHeaderHTML
fields.Description: Custom message that displays at the top of all receipts.

fields.Name: receiptLinesFieldset
fields.Description: Stores the custom fieldsets of a receipt line as a CSV.

fields.Name: receiptPageOverride
fields.Description: Defines the custom page that will be shown when clicking on a receipt link

fields.Name: requiredTaxFieldsCSV
fields.Description: Enter the API name of the Sales Order Billing address field the system will require on checkout. (Ex. Billing_State__c)

fields.Name: shippingRateBasis
fields.Description: Select whether you want shipping to be calculated based on item weight or item value (price).

fields.Name: theme
fields.Description: Link to the Theme to use for the Business Group's eInvoicing portal.

fields.Name: transfersPayableAccount
fields.Description: The GL Account to use for intracompany transfer payable transactions.

fields.Name: transfersReceivableAccount
fields.Description: The GL Account to use for intracompany transfer receivable transactions.

fields.Name: type
fields.Description: List of Business Group Types (Department, Affiliate, Partner, Etc.). Select the most appropriate type from the list.

fields.Name: Catalog
fields.Description: Catalog wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (catalogFilters -> Catalog_Filters__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Catalog__c

fields.Name: catalogFilters
fields.Description: Lists the filters to be displayed in the left side of the page when on the current catalog. Displays as defined in the field.

fields.Name: displayFeaturedItems
fields.Description: Checking this box displays all featured items within this catalog and any child catalogs at the top of the page.

fields.Name: displayOrder
fields.Description: Display order of catalogs that will be displayed on campaign pages

fields.Name: placeholderImage
fields.Description: Image to display if item does not have it's own image

fields.Name: CreditMemo
fields.Description: CreditMemo wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (catalogFilters -> Catalog_Filters__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Credit_Memo__c

fields.Name: account
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's account record. Auto-populates with the related contact's parent account if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: amount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Total over payments received.

fields.Name: businessGroup
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the business group record - business groups will auto-populate if not defined on entry.

fields.Name: contact
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's contact record. Auto-populates with the related account's primary contact if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: creditAccount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The account to use for crediting additional revenue received. Default value is the linked Business Group's Credit Memo account.

fields.Name: customerLink
fields.Description: System Calculated Link to the customer record.

fields.Name: debitAccount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The GL account to use when posting to debit. Default value is the linked Business Group's writeoff account.

fields.Name: entity
fields.Description: Required Select "Account" if the Credit Memo should be added to the related account, select "Contact" if the Credit Memo should be added to the related "Contact".

fields.Name: invoice
fields.Description: Invoice where the OverPayment is made.

fields.Name: isDrafted
fields.Description: When checked, the credit memo is in a draft status.

fields.Name: isPosted
fields.Description: When checked, the credit memo creates transactions.

fields.Name: postedDate
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The date the Credit Memo was posted.

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Primary indicator of the credit memo's current status. Default value is "Draft".

fields.Name: appliedAmount
fields.Description: System Calculated The total amount of credit memo lines that have been posted related to this Credit Memo.

fields.Name: CreditNote
fields.Description: CreditNote wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (catalogFilters -> Catalog_Filters__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Credit_Note__c

fields.Name: account
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's account record. Auto-populates with the related account's primary contact if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: billingCity
fields.Description: The value of this field will be updated with the Account's Billing City or Contact's Mailing City, based on "Entity" if not defined on record entry.

fields.Name: billingCountry
fields.Description: The value of this field will be updated with the Account's Billing Country or Contact's Mailing Country, based on "Entity" if not defined on record entry.

fields.Name: billingPostalCode
fields.Description: The value of this field will be updated with the Account's Billing Postal Code or Contact's Mailing Postal Code, based on "Entity" if not defined on record entry.

fields.Name: billingState
fields.Description: The value of this field will be updated with the Account's Billing State or Contact's Mailing State, based on "Entity" if not defined on record entry.

fields.Name: billingStreet
fields.Description: System Calculated/Conditional Billing Street derives from the Contact Mailing Street or the Account Billing Street when Calculate Billing Details is checked.

fields.Name: contact
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's contact record. Auto-populates with the related account's primary contact if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: customer
fields.Description: System Calculated Link to the customer's record, controlled by the "Entity" field.

fields.Name: entity
fields.Description: Required Select "Account" if the credit note should be applied to the related account, select "Contact" if the credit note should be applied to the related "Contact".

fields.Name: invoiceNumber
fields.Description: Invoice number related to the Invoice.

fields.Name: invoice
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the invoice that generated the credit note.

fields.Name: isPosted
fields.Description: Checked if the credit note has been posted and transactions (journal entries) have been created.

fields.Name: memo
fields.Description: Optional memo that will display on the credit note sent to the customer as well as on customer statements.

fields.Name: postedDate
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The date the transaction posted.

fields.Name: total
fields.Description: System Calculated Sum of all adjustment lines

fields.Name: Event
fields.Description: Event wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (displayName -> Display_Name__c)

fields.Name: EventChatterGroup
fields.Description: EventChatterGroup wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (groupName -> Group_Name__c)

fields.Name: Invoice
fields.Description: Invoice wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (balanceDue -> Balance_Due__c)

fields.Name: Item
fields.Description: Item wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (itemClass -> Item_Class__c)

fields.Name: PackageItem
fields.Description: PackageItem wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (displayItem -> Display_Item__c)

fields.Name: PaymentGateway
fields.Description: PaymentGateway wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (businessGroup -> Business_Group__c)

fields.Name: PaymentMethod
fields.Description: PaymentMethod wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (cardType -> Card_Type__c)

fields.Name: PriceRule
fields.Description: PriceRule wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (isDefault -> Is_Default__c)

fields.Name: Receipt
fields.Description: Receipt wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (appliedAmount -> Applied_Amount__c)

fields.Name: ReceiptLine
fields.Description: ReceiptLine wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (invoiceLine -> Invoice_Line__c)

fields.Name: SalesOrder
fields.Description: SalesOrder wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (businessGroup -> Business_Group__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Sales_Order__c

fields.Name: paymentGateway
fields.Description: System Calculated The related payment gateway.

fields.Name: sourceCode
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to Source Code.

fields.Name: entity
fields.Description: Required Select "Account" if the related the account is responsible payment of the customer order, Select "Contact" if the related contact is responsible payment of the customer order.

fields.Name: businessGroup
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the business group record - business groups will auto-populate if not defined on entry.

fields.Name: account
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's account record. Auto-populates with the related contact's parent account if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: contact
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Link to the customer's contact record. Auto-populates with the related account's primary contact if not defined prior to entry.

fields.Name: paymentTerms
fields.Description: The payment terms for the sales order. If not defined on record creation the default terms defined in the admin settings are used.

fields.Name: invoiceDate
fields.Description: System Calculated/Conditional/Override The date to use as the Invoice Date for any Invoice generated from the Sales Order only applies to Sales Orders where Is Scheduled is not set to true.

fields.Name: closedDate
fields.Description: The date the Sales Order was closed.

fields.Name: status
fields.Description: The status of the Sales Order.

fields.Name: isPosted
fields.Description: When checked all Invoices related to the Sales Order will post an receivable transaction to the GL.

fields.Name: isPendingPayment
fields.Description: When checked, the related Sales Order is pending payment due to offsite payment or shippable items.

fields.Name: isClosed
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Checked when the Sales Order is closed. Sales Orders close automatically when paid in full by the customer, when a contract expires, or when a contract/recurring Sales Order is cancelled.

fields.Name: postingEntity
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The entity the Sales Order posted too. Sales Orders either post through an Invoice(s) or through a single Receipt as a Cash Sale.

fields.Name: dueDate
fields.Description: System Calculated Invoice Date field + Payment Term.Variable

fields.Name: isProforma
fields.Description: When this field is checked, this sales order will be displayed in the community.

fields.Name: SalesOrderLine
fields.Description: SalesOrderLine wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (isShippingRate -> Is_Shipping_Rate__c) Maps To: OrderApi__Sales_Order_Line__c

fields.Name: isTax
fields.Description: Defines the Sales Order Line that is being used for tax.

fields.Name: isShippingRate
fields.Description: Defines the Sales Order Line that is being used for shipping.

fields.Name: quantity
fields.Description: Conditionally Required The quantity (number of units) of the item related to the sales order line. Required when an Item is linked that does not have "Disable Price Rules" checked. Default 1.

fields.Name: priceOverride
fields.Description: Overrides the calculation of price based on the most appropriate price for the purchasing customer. Default is unchecked.

fields.Name: systemOverride
fields.Description: SYSTEM Overrides the calculation of price and Price rule. Default is unchecked.

fields.Name: shippingMethod
fields.Description: Lookup to select a Shipping Method associated with the Sales Order Line.

fields.Name: entity
fields.Description: Conditionally Required Select "Account" to assign the Item on the Sales Order Line to the linked "Account" field -- otherwise select "Contact". Defaults to the value of the same field on the Sales Order.

fields.Name: salePrice
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override The price per-unit for the item sold on the sales order line.

fields.Name: salesOrderLine
fields.Description: Sales Order Lines that link to "Package" Items will include the Items into the Sales Order as new Sales Order Lines which will have a parent/child relationship with the Sales Order Line that links to the "Package" Item.

fields.Name: displayItem
fields.Description: By checking this field you are choosing the item to be displayed on the shopping cart, checkout, and receipt pages.

fields.Name: item
fields.Description: Link to the item related to the sales order.

fields.Name: priceRule
fields.Description: The price rule related to the sales order line. When added or changed, the unit price will reflect the price defined on the price rule.

fields.Name: total
fields.Description: System Calculated Total amount of Sales Order Line

fields.Name: taxPercent
fields.Description: Combined with the Parent Sale Order Line's Sales Price, this field is used to calculate the tax amount for the related item.

fields.Name: salesOrder
fields.Description: Required All Sales Order Lines require a linked Sales Order.

fields.Name: packageItem
fields.Description: System Calculated / Conditionally Required Creates a relationship to the Package Item when the Sales Order Line is created as a result of purchasing the parent package item.

fields.Name: lineDescription
fields.Description: Optional line description will be added to sales orders, invoices, receipts, and detailed customer statements. If blank, the value of this field will match the value of the related item's "Line Description" field.

fields.Name: listPrice
fields.Description: System Calculated The standard price for the item selected on the sales order line.

fields.Name: contact
fields.Description: Conditionally Required System Calculated Override Link to the Contact who is the primary assignee of the Item purchased on the Sales Order Line. Required if "Enable Assignments" is checked on the related Item. Defaults to the Sales Order Contact.

fields.Name: account
fields.Description: Conditionally Required System Calculated Override Link to the Account that is assigned to the Sales Order Line -- valid if the linked "Item" "Enable Assignments" is checked, and the "Entity" is set to "Account". Defaults to the Sales Order "Account".

fields.Name: isRenewal
fields.Description: When checked, related Sales Order Line is considered as "Subscription Renewal".

fields.Name: isValid
fields.Description: When an Item that requires certain options or assignments is linked to the line, the line is considered "Invalid" until all requirements are met. Defaults checked for Items with no requirements, otherwise defaults unchecked.

fields.Name: isAmendment
fields.Description: When checked, related Sales Order Line is considered as "Subscription Amendment"

fields.Name: isPosted
fields.Description: When checked all Invoices related to the Sales Order will post an receivable transaction to the GL.

fields.Name: isSubscription
fields.Description: System Calculated Checked when the Sales Order Line is linked to a "Subscription" Item.

fields.Name: enableAutoRenew
fields.Description: When checked, the subscription will automatically attempt to renew itself by charging the related Payment Method. Defaults unchecked.

fields.Name: isRequiredPackageItem
fields.Description: System Calculated Checked when the sales order line is linked to a package item where "Is Required" is also checked.

fields.Name: autoCalculateActivationDate
fields.Description: System Calculated Override Valid if the Sales Order Line is related to a "Subscription" Item. When checked, the system will automatically calculate the "Activation Date" based on conditions set on the selected "Subscription Plan". Defaults checked.

fields.Name: subscription
fields.Description: Link to the Subscription that is being upgraded or renewed.

fields.Name: subscriptionPlan
fields.Description: Conditionally Required Link to the related plan that controls Activation and Expiration dates related to any Subscription Item. Required when the Sales Order Line is linked to a Item that is the child of a "Subscription" Item Class.

fields.Name: subscriptionStartDate
fields.Description: The date in this field defines the subscription's start date.

fields.Name: endDate
fields.Description: System Calculated Override Conditionally Required The date the Subscription will be ended is calculated based on conditions set on the related Subscription Plan and Activation Date.

fields.Name: activationDate
fields.Description: System Calculated Override Conditionally Required The date the Subscription will be activated is calculated based on conditions set on the related Subscription Plan and can be manually over-ridden if "Auto Calculate Activation Date" is unchecked.

fields.Name: businessGroup
fields.Description: System Calculated/Override Default value is mapped from the parent sales order. The Business Group controls what items are available to associate with the order line. If no value exists, all active items will be allowed to be associated.

fields.Name: doNotCollectPayment
fields.Description: When checked, the related Sales Order Line will not be added to the EPayment and Receipt. Customer will not be charged for this Sales Order Line.

fields.Name: isInstallmentCalculated
fields.Description: System Calculated Checked if sol type is installment and if the amount is Calculated.

fields.Name: totalInstallmentPrice
fields.Description: System Calculated Total amount of all the installments created as a result of this sales order line.

fields.Name: shippingState
fields.Description: Optional shipping state for the item's ordered on the order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent order's "Shipping State" field.

fields.Name: activeAssignments
fields.Description: System Calculated Number of Active Assignments. Valid and restricted to Items where "Enable Assignments" is checked. Defaults 0 if no Assignments found.

fields.Name: assignmentsAllowed
fields.Description: System Calculated If the Item "Enable Assignments" and "Restrict Number of Assignments" fields are checked, the Item "Maximum Number of Assignments" x the Line "Quantity" is set. Otherwise no value is set.

fields.Name: assignmentsAvailable
fields.Description: System Calculated If the Item "Restricts Number of Assignments" then Assignments Allowed - Active Assignments is set. Otherwise the value is null.

fields.Name: autoAssignAccountContacts
fields.Description: Checked when a Auto Assign Rule set "All Account Contacts"

fields.Name: autoAssignContact
fields.Description: Checked when Auto Assignment Rule set to "Contact"

fields.Name: autoAssignRule
fields.Description: Defines the Assignment creation rule for related Account or Contact.

fields.Name: autoAssign
fields.Description: When it is checked, assignment records will be created depending on "Auto Assign Rule".

fields.Name: calculateShippingDetails
fields.Description: Default checked. Copies the shipping information from the sales order.

fields.Name: disableScheduling
fields.Description: Scheduling is disabled for this line and the total is added as a line to the first installment.

fields.Name: gLAccount
fields.Description: System Calculated/Required/Override Link to the related GL Account.

fields.Name: itemClass
fields.Description: System Calculated / Override Link to the related Item Class.

fields.Name: paymentMethod
fields.Description: Conditionally Required Required if a Subscription Item and Subscription Plan configuration has "Require Valid Payment Method" checked. The Payment Method must also be related to the purchasing/subscribing Account or Contact.

fields.Name: requiredPackageItems
fields.Description: This field aggregates the total number of required package items needed to fulfill a sales order with this item.

fields.Name: shippingCity
fields.Description: Optional shipping city for the item's ordered on the order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent order's "Shipping City" field.

fields.Name: shippingContact
fields.Description: Optional shipping contact for the item's ordered on the sales order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent sales order's "Shipping Contact" field.

fields.Name: shippingCountry
fields.Description: Optional shipping country for the item's ordered on the order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent order's "Shipping Country" field.

fields.Name: shippingPostalCode
fields.Description: Optional shipping postal code for the item's ordered on the order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent order's '"Shipping Postal Code" field.

fields.Name: shippingStreet
fields.Description: Optional shipping street for the item's ordered on the order line. If left blank, the value of this field will be updated with the value of the parent order's "Shipping Street" field.

fields.Name: shippingTrackingNumber
fields.Description: Field for admins to input a Shipping Tracking Number.

fields.Name: taxOverride
fields.Description: This field is used to override any tax calculations by the system.

fields.Name: taxAmount
fields.Description: This field shows the total amount of tax that is applied for the item.

fields.Name: totalWithTax
fields.Description: The total amount of the line with tax included.

fields.Name: parentForeignKey
fields.Description: System Field, For Coding purposes only. Used to efficiently insert sales order lines and its related child sales order lines in our system.

fields.Name: foreignKey
fields.Description: System Field, For Coding purposes only. Used to efficiently insert sales order lines and its related child sales order lines in our system.

fields.Name: incomplete
fields.Description: When checked this Sales Order Line is identified as a line that has not been fully completed to be added to the cart.

fields.Name: ScheduledPayment
fields.Description: ScheduledPayment wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (paymentMethod -> Payment_Method__c)

fields.Name: ScheduledPaymentLine
fields.Description: ScheduledPaymentLine wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (paymentMethod -> Payment_Method__c)

fields.Name: Store
fields.Description: Store wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (enableTaxInclusivePricing -> Enable_Tax_Inclusive_Pricing__c)

fields.Name: Subscription
fields.Description: Subscription wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (salesOrderLine -> Sales_Order_Line__c)

fields.Name: SubscriptionLine
fields.Description: SubscriptionLine wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (salesOrderLine -> Sales_Order_Line__c)

fields.Name: SubscriptionPlan
fields.Description: SubscriptionPlan wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (isActive -> Is_Active__c)

fields.Name: Term
fields.Description: Term wrapped object with camel case properties. Each properties maps to a field on the SObject that has _ for each capital letter. Ex. (isActive -> Is_Active__c)
